summary: Spec review accepts the bounded Harbor real identity browser session slice.
reviewed_validation_summary: `pnpm typecheck`; `pnpm test`; `pnpm smoke:runtime`; `pnpm smoke:runtime:local`; `git diff --check`; `loom fact-chain --target . --json`; `loom verify --target . --json`; `loom suite validate --target . --item HARBOR-209 --json`; `loom suite carrier validate --target . --item HARBOR-209 --json`; `loom suite evidence validate --target . --item HARBOR-209 --json` passed locally.

semantic_review_disposition.reason: The spec is constrained to launching local identity browser sessions, opening Xiaohongshu/BOSS default pages, reporting public page facts, handoff/release ownership, and evidence refs.

implementation_review_disposition.reason: The implementation contract excludes login, write actions, CAPTCHA/risk-control bypass, raw browser material export, and cross-repo changes.
